seoTitle: Arable vs Arakoon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Arable and Arakoon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Arable and Arakoon.
heading: Arable vs Arakoon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Arable, New South Wales and Arakoon, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Arakoon has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Arable (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Arable or Arakoon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Arable has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Arakoon scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Arable scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Arakoon scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Arable or Arakoon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Arakoon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
